_comment: Configurable Definition of Ready & gate policy. 'default' applies unless a team override is selected via analyse_story(text, team='<name>'). Each team inherits 'default' and overrides only the keys it sets.

back-office._comment: Regulated financial back-office: stricter bar, no human-review band.

platform._comment: Platform team: slightly looser bar, borderline scores go to human review.

discovery._comment: Early discovery work: lenient, wide human-review band, allows extra vague terms during spikes.

dashboard-demo._comment: Used by the dashboard demo: review band on, so borderline stories reach the human queue.
